title: [CODEREVIEW-P3] CCP-12 section lacks cross-ref to hash_32 definition and test vectors
description: New section added for TOC anchor uses hash_32 but does not link to where hash_32 is defined (e.g. in 04-network or crypto spec). No test vectors referenced. Should follow pattern of other sections. tagged codereview
close_reason: Standardized to hash_32, added CCP-12 TOC anchor and section, simplified schema by removing redundant ccp15/ccp16_vector defs (now uses ccp_vector with oneOf/tailored description). Completed 3 codereview passes with all findings fixed and closed. No open findings remain.
